purpose: End-to-end 8xMI350 check for the selected-limit TileLang compressed-dKV bridge before investing further integration work.

comparison.read: The selected-limit TileLang bridge does not improve the retained 8x anchor and decays after step 2.

observations: The run completed all 4 requested steps with clean process-group teardown.
TileLang compiled mfma_panel_atomic_final_limited_bshd_source_hsk_bf16_scaled_prim during startup on all ranks.
TileLang emitted data-race warnings for group_acc(local_slot, d_i); the run still completed, but this is not a production-ready signal.
This backend is still a late compressed-dKV replacement. TorchTitan still pays upstream sparse-backward boundary costs before the TileLang bridge.

decision.next_action: Stop optimizing the late selected-limit dKV bridge as an e2e TFLOPs lever. If TileLang remains the path, port or fuse the whole sparse-MLA backward boundary so the kernel consumes q, dO, shared/compressed KV, LI indices, output, lse, and sink directly, avoiding HSK/probs/grad_logits/selected-state materialization.

commands_run: env TARGET_HOST=do-sonle5-mi350-gpu REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 IMAGE=sonle5/nexus-titan-rocm722-mori-tilelang:20260604 RUN_ID=torchtitan_dsv4_tilelang_selected_limit_8x_s4096_gbs128_steps4_20260604 GPUS_PER_NODE=8 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7 CANARY_EP=8 CANARY_GBS=128 CANARY_STEPS=4 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=full CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_MAX_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_BACKWARD_MODE=shared_kv CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_KERNEL_MODULE=torchtitan.models.deepseek_v4.sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend CANARY_SHAREDKV_BACKWARD_MODE=explicit_tilelang_dkv CANARY_SHAREDKV_TILELANG_DKV_BACKEND=selected_limit_hsk_bf16_scaled_source CANARY_DSV4_PROFILE_SHAREDKV_BACKWARD=false CANARY_LI_KL_BACKEND=triton_tl_dot CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=true CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_SWIGLU_BACKEND=triton CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_COMBINE_INPUT_MODE=registered CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True CANARY_PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True experiments/2026-05-27-deepseek-v4-amd-pretrain/launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run
